event_title: Need a Home for Haoyi Li By the Bay!
title: Need a Home for Haoyi Li By the Bay!
description: Haoyi is coming to the Bay Area, 6/12-18. If you can host us in downtown San Francisco in that date range, please contact Alexy to organize: alexy @ chiefscientist.org. We need to fit at least 50 people and would appreciate pizza+beer from the host or another sponsor.
